detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文閱讀與討論(一) (English Reading and Discussion I)	開課班級 : 應英一年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
- This course aims to help students get access to English-speaking environments and the cultures underlying them through watching a series of Oscar-winning movies. - Students are oriented to reiterate the storyline and discuss the thoughts behind the films using effective communicative language skills in the class. - The content of the films comprises a multitude of themes, e.g., youth’s love, growth, faith, and interrelationship, which motivate students to start deeper thoughts and reflections on their life experiences. - Students also have the opportunities of introducing their favorite movies in the individual/group presentations or the course forums on the internet. 


2.教學綱要
Supplementary resources: Websites.
1. Wikipedia in search of Academy Awards: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Academy_Awards
2. Internet Movie Data Base (IMDB): http://www.imdb.com/
3. Subscene: https://subscene.com/
4. American Rhetoric (Movie Speeches): http://www.americanrhetoric.com/moviespeeches.htm
5. Movie reviews and ratings by Film Critic Roger Ebert: http://www.rogerebert.com/
6. The Greatest Films: http://www.filmsite.org/
7. Awesome Movie Scripts: http://www.awesomefilm.com/
8. Simply Scripts: http://www.simplyscripts.com/
9. Drew’s Scripts-O-Rama: http://www.script-o-rama.com/
10. The English Learner Movie Guides: http://www.eslnotes.com/index.html
11. DVD Beaver: http://www.dvdbeaver.com/

 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Reading Explore 4　
出版日期 : 2023年 10月 
作者 : Bohlke, David,MacIntyre, Paul,Rogers, Bruce　出版社 : Heinle ELT　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. Attendance & in-class Learning sheet participation 30% 2. 4 Reflective papers of Homework 20% 2. Mid-term(presentation) 25% 3. Final exam (presentation) 25%  
1.We are all responsible for maintaining a good learning ambiance for the class. 2. When you enter the classroom, make sure you have already set your cellphones on silent mode.  
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG11 永續城鄉


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
